title: sarcostemma cynanchoides subsp. hartwegii
intro: Sarcostemma cynanchoides subsp. hartwegii, also known as the "Devil's Backbone," is a succulent plant species that is native to tropical regions of the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the management of diabetes. Sarcostemma cynanchoides subsp. hartwegii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
